steps.title: Apply the sample-size warning
steps.content: Andrade's study used a mean sample size of only 12 fish. Bennett and colleagues warn that relatively small sample sizes can increase bias and contribute to reports of exaggerated effects.

steps.title: Avoid overclaims
steps.content: Choice A is unsupported because no earlier studies are compared. Choice B adds implications for other species. Choice D goes too far by saying the conclusion has been invalidated. The direct suggestion is that Andrade's reported effect may be exaggerated. The answer is C.
